headline: Will Deere's Tenna Buyout Aid Its Construction & Forestry Segment?
summary: DE acquires Tenna to scale mixed-fleet tech and boost its Construction & Forestry push. Can the real-time platform help contractors optimize fleets and job sites?

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Deere (DE) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Deere's share price still reflects good value after a strong run, you are not alone. This piece will help you frame that question clearly. The stock closed at US$590.69, with returns of 8.4% over the last 30 days, 26.5% year to date, 24.0% over 1 year, 46.2% over 3 years and 73.0% over 5 years. This naturally raises questions about how much of the story is already priced in. Recent attention on Deere has been driven by ongoing interest in capital goods and...

headline: How Iran and Venezuela strikes transform the Trump-Xi trade talks
summary: The Iran war and the U.S. attack in Venezuela show a Trump administration more willing to eschew diplomacy and take military action.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Consider Right Now and 2 We Turn Down
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.
